brand.tagline: Convert in your browser. Nothing ever leaves your device.

hero.subtitle: iFlexi runs every conversion locally in your browser. No queues, no uploads, no waiting. Drag, drop, download.

features.title: Zero cloud upload
features.body: Conversion happens locally via the Canvas API. Your files never leave your device.

features.title: Cinematic fine-tuning
features.body: Dial in quality with millimetric precision and watch file size update in real time.

features.title: Batch · one-click ZIP
features.body: Compress dozens of files into one neat package — your folder structure stays yours.

account.title: Account
account.subtitle: Manage your plan, usage, and preferences.

chart.title: Conversion activity
chart.empty: No data yet. Run your first conversion to see your activity.

history.title: Conversion history
history.empty: No conversions yet. Once you convert files, they'll appear here.

settings.name: Name
settings.emailLocked: Email is locked for account security.
settings.deleteConfirm: This will permanently delete your account and all related data. This cannot be undone.

referral.title: Invite friends
referral.subtitle: Share your link. Each friend who signs up earns you +5 extra files this week.
referral.stats: {count} friends invited · +{bonus} bonus files this week
referral.noneYet: No invites yet — share your link to earn bonus files.

developer.title: API access
developer.proOnly: API access is available on the Pro plan.
developer.intro: Generate an API key to integrate iFlexi into your own apps. Only one active key is allowed at a time.
developer.soonNote: Coming soon: integration with the conversion API endpoint.
developer.newKeyDesc: Copy this key now. For your security, we will never show it again.
developer.confirmRevoke: Revoke this key? Apps using it will stop working immediately.

security.twoFactorDesc: Add an extra layer of security to your account.

footer.tagline: Every conversion happens on your device. Your files are never uploaded, never seen.

converter.title: Converter
converter.description: All processing in your browser. PNG · JPG · WEBP · GIF · BMP · TIFF · PDF.
converter.mergePdf: Merge all files into one PDF

pricing.title: Simple pricing.
pricing.subtitle: Clear value.
pricing.description: No hidden fees, no commitments. Every plan uses the same secure engine running in your browser.
pricing.soon: Pro upgrade will soon be integrated with our payment provider.
pricing.alreadyFree: You are already a free member.

faq.q: Are my files uploaded to your server?
faq.a: No. All conversion happens in your browser. Not a single byte leaves your device.

faq.q: Does the Pro trial charge automatically?
faq.a: No. You can cancel anytime during the 14-day trial, no credit card required.
Yes. You can upgrade or downgrade with one click from your account panel.

faq.q: When does the weekly limit reset?
faq.a: It resets automatically exactly 7 days after your first conversion.

limits.title: Your week, at a glance.
limits.description: For fair use, every plan comes with a weekly conversion budget. Your budget automatically resets exactly 7 days after your first conversion.
limits.guestCta: Sign in to increase your limit
limits.countdownStart: Weekly counter starts with your first conversion.
